wishlist200.metaDesc: Thanks for helping Sector Scavengers reach 200 Steam wishlists.
wishlist200.title: Thanks for helping us reach 200 wishlists!
wishlist200.cta: Wishlist on Steam and join the next playtest wave
wishlist200.hudP1: We hit 200 Steam wishlists on Sector Scavengers — and we could not have done it without everyone following along, sharing the signal, and jumping into playtests.
wishlist200.hudP2: Thank you to our community and playtest crew:
wishlist200.hudNames: Vinsmoke, Igor Allexander, Blurryface, Zoltu, Raks Walker, ShiroSaints, Akira, Seventhly, Ezio, Kurozzz, The Robe of Fire team, Ji, Imran, HeroGamer, Imran, Ben Vibrant, Matheo, Markoso, Linds, Shiva, Icebear, Joshua Burrito, Simona, Novabrand, and anyone else following and supporting the game!
wishlist200.hudP3: More builds, more wrecks, and more feedback soon. Stay on channel.

loreHub.title: Lore
loreHub.lede: Rainforest-era files, alumni-list mythology, and the corporate weather that hardened long before Signal & Salvage. More entries ship as we finish the web versions.
loreHub.originDesc: Wake into ledger: illustrated strip—layoffs, cryo as severance, debt sold to salvage, first derelicts.
loreHub.beerDesc: The last real one, Building B, Employee Number Two, and the rooftop that outranked Corporate Risk.
loreHub.novelDesc: Book 1 as a scroll comic—balloons carry the story, with the full script tucked under each chapter.

index.eyebrow: Severance bought you sleep. Sleep sold you forward.
index.howLead: You stage every salvage run from the hub. Inside a derelict the run is a card game with teeth: a fixed hand size, a fuel gauge, and a hull that does not care about your intent. The panels below restate the non-negotiables in briefing form, same mechanics, louder line.
